## Description
Add achievements, badges, and streaks for saving money.

## Benefits
- Increase engagement
- Motivate saving behavior
- Make saving fun

## Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Achievement system (e.g., "Saved 100€", "10 days streak")
- [ ] Badge collection UI
- [ ] Leaderboard (optional, anonymous)
- [ ] Streak tracking

- See IDEAS.md section: User Experience Enhancements
